column1: # MyD88 (myeloid differentiation primary response 88) across mammals.
# A TLR/IL-1R adaptor; the C-terminal TIR domain is where signalling-relevant
# substitutions cluster. Inspired by Irving et al. 2023 (PMC10162675), which
# compared MyD88 across bats vs other mammals. Bats are highlighted because of
# their unusual tolerance of viral infection. Human is listed first so it can
# be used as the `relativeTo` reference row (identical residues render as dots).
# Lines starting with # are comments. Reviewed (Swiss-Prot) entries preferred;
# bat orthologs are unreviewed (TrEMBL) genome annotations.
